arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Inter Milan – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Bayern Munich host Inter Milan in a heavyweight Champions League quarter-final tie this evening. The German giants meet the Italian champions at the Allianz Arena, in a rematch of the 2010 final. Bayern breezed past Bayer Leverkusen to reach this stage, while Inter ousted Feyenoord in the previous round to reach the last eight. arts.ttl: Inter Milan XI vs Bayern – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Inter Milan make the trip to Germany to face Bayern Munich in the Champions League quarter-finals tonight. Simeone Inzaghi has talked up his team’s chances of a treble, as Inter pursue the Serie A title, Coppa Italia and Champions League this season. Bayern Munich vs. Inter Milan Predicted Lineups: Champions League Quarterfinals
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies, Jamal Musiala, Mehdi Taremi, Denzel Dumfries and Manuel Neuer are amongst the players that will miss the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals between Bayern Munich and Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich’s Thomas Müller ready to put focus on Inter Milan match; Manchester United out on Xavi Simons; Jadon Sancho back to BVB?; Chelsea wants Jamie Gittens; Xabi Alonso to stay at Bayer Leverkusen?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich legend Thomas Müller has been through a lot over the past week, but as he thanks fans for all of their support, he wanted to point everyone’s focus back toward Inter Milan as the Bavarians prepare for today’s match: Manchester United winger Jadon Sancho, who is on loan at Chelsea with an obligation to sign permanently for £25m in the summer, is keen to return to Borussia Dortmund, with Bundesliga rivals Bayer Leverkusen also interested.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany holds deep respect for Inter Milan, Simone Inzaghi
arts.sum: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany holds a lot of respect for Inter Milan and Simone Inzaghi ahead of his team’s Champions League showdown with the Serie A powerhouse. Inter Milan in the Champions League?
